title: Mock Test 26 - Question Tags
description: এই টেস্টে Question Tags নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন রয়েছে। প্রথম কয়েকটি প্রশ্নে জানবো নিয়ম ও গঠন, তারপর fill in the blanks, error detection ও অনুবাদ দিয়ে উদাহরণ সহ শেখা। প্রতিটি প্রশ্নের বাংলা অর্থ ও বিস্তারিত ব্যাখ্যা দেওয়া আছে।

questions.question: Question Tag-এর মূল নিয়ম কী?
options: Affirmative sentence → Negative tag, Negative sentence → Affirmative tag
questions.explanation: মূল নিয়ম: Affirmative (positive) sentence → Negative tag। Negative sentence → Affirmative tag। যেমন: You are coming, aren't you? (aff → neg)। You aren't coming, are you? (neg → aff)।

questions.question: Question Tag-এ auxiliary verb না থাকলে কী ব্যবহার করা হয়?
questions.explanation: সেন্টেন্সে auxiliary verb না থাকলে tense অনুযায়ী do/does/did ব্যবহার করা হয়। যেমন: You like coffee, don't you? (Present)। He went home, didn't he? (Past)। She plays tennis, doesn't she? (3rd person)।

questions.question: 'I am'-এর Question Tag কী হয়?
questions.explanation: 'I am'-এর tag = 'aren't I?' (exception)। যেমন: I am right, aren't I? ('Amn't I' = archaic, এখন ব্যবহার হয় না)।

questions.question: Imperative sentence-এর Question Tag কী হয়?
questions.explanation: Imperative sentence (order/request)-এর tag = 'will you?' বা 'won't you?'। যেমন: Open the door, will you? (request)। Don't be late, will you? (negative imperative → শুধু 'will you?')।

questions.question: 'Let's' দিয়ে শুরু sentence-এর Question Tag কী হয়?
questions.explanation: 'Let's' (Let us) → tag = 'shall we?'। যেমন: Let's go for a walk, shall we? Let's start the class, shall we?

questions.question: You are coming to the party, ___ ? (তুমি পার্টিতে আসছ, তাই না?)
questions.explanation: Affirmative sentence (are) → negative tag (aren't you?)। 'You are coming to the party, aren't you?'

questions.question: She doesn't like coffee, ___ ? (সে কফি পছন্দ করে না, তাই না?)
questions.explanation: Negative sentence (doesn't) → affirmative tag (does she?)। 'She doesn't like coffee, does she?'

questions.question: He went to school yesterday, ___ ? (সে গতকাল স্কুলে গিয়েছিল, তাই না?)
questions.explanation: Affirmative Past (went = did go) → negative tag (didn't he?)। 'He went to school yesterday, didn't he?'

questions.question: You can swim, ___ ? (তুমি সাঁতার পারো, তাই না?)
questions.explanation: Affirmative (can) → negative tag (can't you?)। 'You can swim, can't you?'

questions.question: They have finished the work, ___ ? (তারা কাজ শেষ করেছে, তাই না?)
questions.explanation: Affirmative Present Perfect (have finished) → negative tag (haven't they?)। 'They have finished the work, haven't they?'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'You are tired, are you?' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: Affirmative sentence → negative tag হওয়া উচিত। সঠিক: 'You are tired, aren't you?'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'She doesn't like tea, doesn't she?' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: Negative sentence → affirmative tag হওয়া উচিত। সঠিক: 'She doesn't like tea, does she?'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'I am right, amn't I?' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'I am'-এর tag = 'aren't I?'। 'Amn't I?' = পুরনো/ভুল। সঠিক: 'I am right, aren't I?'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'Let's go, don't we?' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'Let's'-এর tag = 'shall we?'। সঠিক: 'Let's go, shall we?'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'You like ice cream, ___ ?' (তুমি আইসক্রিম পছন্দ করো, তাই না?)
questions.explanation: Affirmative Present (like) → auxiliary verb নেই → do/does। 'You like ice cream, don't you?'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'He didn't call you, ___ ?' (সে তোমাকে কল করেনি, তাই না?)
questions.explanation: Negative Past (didn't) → affirmative tag (did he?)। 'He didn't call you, did he?'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'Open the door, ___ ?' (দরজাটা খোলো, তাই না?)
questions.explanation: Imperative sentence → tag = 'will you?'। 'Open the door, will you?'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'Nobody was there, ___ ?' (সেখানে কেউ ছিল না, তাই না?)
questions.explanation: 'Nobody' = negative word → sentence টি effectively negative। তাই tag = affirmative 'were they?'। 'Nobody was there, were they?'

questions.question: বাংলা বাক্যটির সঠিক ইংরেজি অনুবাদ কোনটি? 'তুমি কি পড়াশোনা করছো, তাই না?'
questions.explanation: 'Are studying' = affirmative → negative tag 'aren't you?'। 'You are studying, aren't you?'

questions.question: বাংলা বাক্যটির সঠিক ইংরেজি অনুবাদ কোনটি? 'সে একজন ডাক্তার, তাই না?'
options: He is a doctor, is he?
He is a doctor, isn't he?
He is a doctor, wasn't he?
questions.explanation: 'He is' = affirmative present → negative tag 'isn't he?'। 'He is a doctor, isn't he?'
